# Codex Instructions

The canonical repository instructions are stored in
`.github/instructions/*.instructions.md`.

Before planning, editing, reviewing, or running commands:

1. Read `.github/instructions/general.instructions.md` completely.
2. Read every other file in `.github/instructions/` whose `applyTo` front
   matter matches any file in the task scope.
3. Re-evaluate matching instruction files whenever the task scope changes.

Treat each `applyTo` value as an applicability rule. Keep requirements in
`.github/instructions/`; do not duplicate them here.
